provenance.title: AGENTICAITA: A Proof-of-Concept About Deliberative Multi-Agent Reasoning for Autonomous Trading Systems
affiliations: Department of Information Engineering, Computer Science, and Mathematics, Center of Excellence for Research DEWS, University of L'Aquila, Italy
provenance.abstract: AGENTICAITA: an agentic AI framework replacing signal-then-execute paradigm with autonomous deliberative loop. Multiple specialized LLM agents reason, negotiate, and act without offline training or human intervention. Four contributions: AZTE, SDP, IGP, CBD.
key_claims: Training-free, deterministic safety-constrained multi-agent orchestration for financial trading
Adaptive Z-Score Trigger Engine gates LLM inference on statistically anomalous market conditions only
Sequential Deliberative Pipeline with Analyst -> Risk Manager -> Executor role separation via typed JSON contracts
Inference Gating Protocol ensures reproducible audit trails via mutex-based serialization
Proof-of-concept: 157 zero-intervention invocations across 76 assets with 11.5% agentic friction rate

architecture.description: Containerized microservices over isolated private network. Three functional layers: cognitive (multi-agent + LLM), data (market data + SQLite episodic memory), execution (order routing + privacy).

components.name: AZTE (Adaptive Z-Score Trigger Engine)
components.role: Cognitive resource allocator / market anomaly detector
components.operation: Rolling Z-score computation + disjunctive threshold check

components.name: SDP (Sequential Deliberative Pipeline)
components.role: Three-agent decision chain: Analyst -> Risk Manager -> Executor
inputs: market context (OHLCV, L2, funding rate, CBD score, episodic memory)
outputs: executed trade record or rejection record in SQLite
components.operation: Sequential LLM inference with typed JSON contracts and deterministic hard gates

components.name: Analyst Agent
outputs: {signal: long|short|wait, confidence: float[0,1], entry_price, stop_loss, take_profit, size_usd, reasoning: string}
components.operation: Zero-shot LLM inference with structured output prompt

components.name: Risk Manager Agent
components.role: Two-layer validation: deterministic hard gates + LLM contextual check
components.operation: Layer A: 4 deterministic gates; Layer B: LLM position sizing if gates pass

components.name: Executor Agent
components.role: Order routing with external side effects
components.operation: DRY_RUN: log without placing order; LIVE: route via Tor+VPN privacy channel

components.name: IGP (Inference Gating Protocol)
components.operation: Binary semaphore L; global cooldown 1800s; per-asset cooldown 300s

components.name: CBD (Correlation-Break Diversification)
components.role: Portfolio-aware composite score for asset selection
inputs: asset-BTC price correlation rho over window W
components.operation: Convex combination of exponentially-saturated anomaly magnitude and decorrelation metric

components.name: Episodic Memory
inputs: trade records with agent reasoning traces
outputs: memory briefing injected into Analyst context for same-asset future invocations
components.operation: SQLite WAL-mode database; tables: trades, vol_history, pipeline_log, ollama_calls

components.name: Privacy Layer
components.operation: Public: direct HTTPS for market data; Private: SOCKS5h -> Tor -> VPN for orders

connections: MarketData -> AZTE -> IGP -> Analyst -> RiskManager -> Executor -> DEX/Logs

equations.name: Anomaly Z-Score
equations.role: Statistical anomaly measure; triggers pipeline when >= 2.0

equations.name: Pipeline Trigger Condition
equations.role: Disjunctive gate: Z-score anomaly OR absolute 0.3% return floor

equations.name: Risk Manager Gate: Stop-Loss Distance
equations.role: Hard gate Layer A — max 2% risk per trade

equations.name: Risk Manager Gate: Max Position Size
Agentic Friction
equations.role: Quality metric: fraction of invocations resulting in non-execution

equations.name: Decorrelation Score (CBD)
equations.role: Portfolio decorrelation from BTC; component of composite CBD score

equations.name: Exponential Anomaly Saturation (CBD)
equations.role: Maps unbounded Z-score into [0,1) to match decorrelation scale

equations.name: CBD Composite Score
equations.role: Final asset prioritization score injected into Analyst context

equations.name: Round-Trip Transaction Cost
equations.latex: C^{rt}_i = Q_i P_i f_{\\text{taker}} + \\frac{1}{2}Q_i|P_{\\text{ask}} - P_{\\text{bid}}| + \\lambda \\sigma_i \\sqrt{\\frac{Q_i}{V_i P_i}}
equations.role: Aggregates exchange fee + half-spread + market impact
